name: 🪓 KILL PEST !! - REGRETEVATOR
description:
TAKE THE TOURGUIDE'S CHALLENGE!

NOTE 10/21

"Dear friend. How are you today? I see that you're about to reach your 11th victim! Unfortunately, I haven't seen Pest present at that underground subway he spends an awful amount of time in. Ah well, I'm sure he wouldn't like a visit from me. I'm quite busy with home plans and whatnot anyhow. It would be quite a nuisance to hunt him down!"
"Don't worry, hunter. I'm certain he's about to bring the party to you."
("You've wanted this for a while, but you may not be getting what you bargained for. Ah, well. Consider this training, considering who I've seen coming up next...")

Ah, Pest. At some point, he was quite the cruel bug. Stole things from others and would constantly, blatantly lie about doing so. I don't think he had any friends, really. He was on neutral terms with Bive, and I don't know how to describe his bond with Dr Retro. But Poob's disappearance irked even him, and considering everything that happened afterwards, I think he's not going down without a fight.

He might even be starting one.

I DON'T CARE HOW YOU DO IT OR WHAT YOUR MOTIVATION IS, KILL PEST!!

I can't control what you do, but don't be weird.
creator: LeonBeSimping
